description: Phase 5 (ADR 01066) tiering companion: Firefox (gecko) has no CDP-equivalent global state clear, so it is NOT in the reuse tier and keeps a fresh session per context. Test A plants localStorage; test B, on a new fresh Firefox session, sees none of it. This confirms the non-Chromium path is unchanged (always cold). Runs headless on every platform (Firefox is the default engine in config.groups.json).

tests.description: Plant localStorage on a Firefox context.
Firefox never reuses, so a new session shows no planted state.
